name: Psanan
resolution_reason: Drow, Duergar, Deep Gnomes, Kuo-Toa, and Derro form the dominant Underdark base; Humans, Tieflings, and Yuan-Ti remain permanent secondary surface-facing and port-facing populations.
future_rule: This demographic record may be superseded only by an explicit corrective release preserving contradiction history and source-backed support.
exclusion_note: Dragonborn are shunned in Psanan due to the polity’s deep hatred of dragons.
